comment: Inject missing stripe_customer_ids into the build pipeline when allmoxy_core_customer's stripe_customer_id_* fields are empty. This is a stop-gap until the customer record gets the IDs filled in directly in the source xlsx — once that happens, the override is harmlessly redundant. Each override appends to the customer's stripe_customer_ids array if not already present.

overrides.name: Formations
overrides.reason: Formations paid $750 on 2026-04-30 (Stripe sub) but was missing from allmoxy_core_customer's stripe_customer_id_* fields, which made the charge orphan in the MRR by Month tab as a phantom $750 line in row 6.

overrides.name: Windsor Place
overrides.reason: Windsor Place paid $250 on 2026-04-16 (Stripe sub) but was missing from allmoxy_core_customer's stripe_customer_id_* fields. (Note: the ID contains a capital I, not lowercase l, in 'CrI7KKB' — confirmed against Stripe Sync raw data.)
